title: Manage List
description: Build a list manager that adds and removes items using Angular binding and ngFor.
checklist: Create items array and newItem property
Bind input value and button click handlers
verificationKeywords: *ngFor="let item of items; let i = index"

hints.guide: Import Component and define the component metadata
hints.code:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-manage-list', template: `
  • {{ item }}
` })

hints.guide: Create state properties for the item list and the new item text
Add an addItem method that appends valid text and clears the input
Add a removeItem method that deletes the item by index
Render list items with *ngFor and bind remove button clicks
hints.code: • {{ item }}
